goal: Ship v7.4 Governed Parallel Lanes as a bounded lane-local evidence and Council join semantics contract.
risk: AOF may claim parallel execution when work is merely simultaneous, fragmented, or unjoined by Council authority.
loss_boundary: No governed parallel claim without at least two bounded lanes, lane-local evidence, join/conflict semantics, Council decision, Work Execution Packet, and upstream Multi-Actor Pilot evidence.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v7.4 parallel lane gate
evidence_plan: schema, command, focused tests, Council review, Work Execution Packet, Multi-Actor Pilot, Parallel Lane Pilot audit
stop_conditions: stop if the audit cannot fail missing lane evidence or missing join decision
